trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Action performed: manual send, automatic send, status query, resend, XML download, etc.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Action Type - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Action Type - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: API service consumed: send, status query, or XML download.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field API Consumed - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field API Consumed - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Unique transaction identifier returned by the GrupoMAS platform.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field API Transaction ID - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field API Transaction ID - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Name of the customer or vendor related to the document.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Customer Vendor Name - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Customer Vendor Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Code of the customer or vendor related to the document.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Customer Vendor No. - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Customer Vendor No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Date and time when the electronic invoicing action was recorded.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Date Time - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Date Time - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Number of the source document in Business Central.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Document No. - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Document No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Type of electronic tax document: invoice, credit note, delivery guide, settlement, or withholding.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Document Type - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Document Type - Property Caption
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Entry No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Status returned by the GrupoMAS external electronic invoicing platform.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Received Status - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Received Status - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Message returned by the external API or generated by the extension.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Response Message - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Response Message - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Identifier of the source table in Business Central.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Source Table ID - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field Source Table ID - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: User who executed the electronic invoicing action or process.
trans-unit.note: Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field User ID - Property ToolTip
Table EIE Electronic Trace Log - Field User ID - Property Caption
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType AndTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType BillionsTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType BillionTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType EighteenTxt

Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType FourHundredTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType FourteenTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType FourTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType HundredTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType MillionsTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType MillionTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType NineHundredTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType NineteenTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType NineTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType NinetyTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType OneATxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType OneHundredTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType OneTxt

trans-unit.source: %1 results in a written number that is too long.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Result
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType ResultsErr
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType SevenHundredTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType SeventeenTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType SevenTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType SeventyTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType SixHundredTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType SixteenTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType SixTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType SixtyTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType TenTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType ThirteenTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType ThirtyTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType ThousandTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType ThreeHundredTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType ThreeTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType TwelveTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType TwentyTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType TwoHundredTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType TwoTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType WithTxt
Codeunit EIE Format Number To Text - NamedType ZeroTxt

trans-unit.source: GMAS: The Web Service has returned the following error:\Cod. Status: %1\Description: %2\Detail: %3
trans-unit.note: %1 = Status Code, %2 = Description, %3 = Detail
Codeunit EIE Web Service Request - NamedType ResultResponseErr

trans-unit.source: GMAS: The web service call is unsuccessful
trans-unit.note: Codeunit EIE Web Service Request - NamedType SendErr
Page EIE Electronic Trace Log - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Refreshes the trace log to display the most recent records.

Page EIE Electronic Trace Log - Action Refresh - Property Caption
